name: Butterscotch Brownies (Blonde Brownies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sifted flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. In a saucepan, melt the butter or margarine over low heat.
3. Add the brown sugar to the melted butter and mix well.
4. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
5. Add the beaten egg and vanilla extract, blending until smooth.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating with each addition.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9x9 inch pan and sprinkle the chocolate bits on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, ensuring not to overcook.
9. Allow the brownies to cool in the pan before cutting into bars.
Enjoy your Butterscotch Brownies!
